WaitTime.description: Stop script execution for Time frames, storing the remaining time in the Countdown Variable

RegValueSet.description: Assigns Value to Script Register value

RegDataSet.description: Assigns Value to Script Register value

RegAdrsSet.description: Assigns data in Address offset to Script Register value

AdrsValueSet.description: Assigns Value to the Address offset

AdrsRegSet.description: Assigns Script Register value to the Address offset

RegRegSet.description: Assigns Script Register 2 value to Script Register 1 value

AdrsAdrsSet.description: Assigns data in Address 2 to the Address 1 offset

CompareRegValue.description: Compares Script Register value with Value

CompareRegAdrs.description: Compares Script Register value with data in Address

CompareAdrsReg.description: Compares data in Address with Script Register value

CompareAdrsValue.description: Compares data in Address with Value

CompareAdrsAdrs.description: Compares data in Address 1 with data in Address 2

CompareVarToVar.description: Compares Variable 1 value with Variable 2 value

ReturnCommonScript.description: Returns to the invoking script/function after a Common Script

GoTo.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward

JumpIfObjID.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if invoking event has Event ID as ID

JumpIfPlayerDir.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if player is looking in Player Direction

Call.description: Calls a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward

Return.description: Returns to the invoking script/function after a Call

GoToIf.description: If Condition in the condition table, jumps to a function

CallIf.description: If Condition in the condition table, calls a function

CheckFlagFromVar.description: Checks if Flag is set and store the result in Variable

SetFlagFromVar.description: Sets the flag whose ID is stored in Flag

SetTrainerFlag.description: Sets the flag of Trainer ID, so marks it as beaten trainer

ClearTrainerFlag.description: Clears the flag of Trainer ID, so marks it as unbeaten trainer

CheckTrainerFlag.description: Checks if Trainer ID has been beaten

AddVar.description: Stores the operation Variable + Operand in Variable

SubVar.description: Stores the operation Variable - Operand in Variable

SetVarFromVar.description: Assigns value of Variable 2 to Variable 1

SetVarFromFlexible.description: Stores Flexible Value (or its value if Variable) in Variable

MessageInstant.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file, all at once

Message.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file

MessageVar.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file

WaitABPress.description: Waits for button A or button B to be pressed

WaitABXPadPress.description: Waits for a button to be pressed

WaitABPadPress.description: Waits for button A, button B or pad buttons to be pressed

DrawSignpostInstantMessage.description: Prepares an icon board message box displaying Text Slot message, of Type type, and with Icon image if chosen type supports it

DrawSignpostTextBox.description: Prepares a text board message box of Type type, and with Icon image if chosen type supports it

SetSignpostCommand.description: Triggers different Process processes for the board

WaitForSignpostDone.description: Waits the board last process to end

DrawSignpostScrollingMessage.description: Displays Text Slot message in the current text box, stores the current text box status in Variable

GetSignpostInput.description: Returns 1 to Variable if the player has pressed a button so the board must close, 0 otherwise

ShowYesNoMenu.description: Opens a Yes-No dialog and stores user response in Variable

InitGlobalTextMenu.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with text bank #361, returns selected slot ID in Selection

InitLocalTextMenu.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with local texts, returns selected slot ID in Selection

AddMenuEntryImm.description: Adds an option with Multi Slot ID showing Text Slot text

ShowMenu.description: Shows the prepared multi in screen

InitGlobalTextListMenu.description: Prepares a multiple selection list at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with text bank #361, returns selected slot ID in Selection

InitLocalTextListMenu.description: Prepares a multiple selection list at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with local texts, returns selected slot ID in Selection

AddListMenuEntry.description: Adds a new option to the list, with List Slot ID and showing text line Option MSG. It also displays text line Highlight MSG when that option is highlighted.

ShowListMenu.description: Shows the prepared list in screen

ShowMenuMultiColumn.description: Splits the multi window in Columns different columns

WaitCry.description: Waits the current cry to finish

PlaySound.description: Pauses current music, then Plays Sound

WaitSound.description: Waits for Sound to finish, then resumes music

FadeOutBGM.description: Fades out the current music to Volume in Time frames

FadeInBGM.description: Fades in the current music to normal volume in Time frames

SetBGMPlayerPaused.description: If Status = 1, the track that's currently played by chosen Player ID will pause. If Status = 0, Player ID will resume the previously paused music.

PlayFieldBGM.description: While in the field overworld, plays Music using SSEQ Player #7 (PLAYER_BGM)

CheckRecordedChatotCryIsPlayable.description: Checks if Chatot has custom sound, stores answer in Variable

TryRecordChatotCry.description: Starts Chatot microphone record, stores answer in Variable

SetSubScene63.description: Loads Spear Pillar cutscene sound data (GROUP_SE_CLIMAX in the SDAT)

ApplyMovement.description: Applies movement at Relative Jump to Event ID

WaitMovement.description: Waits for all movements to finish

LockAll.description: Locks every event in the map

ReleaseAll.description: Releases every event in the map

AddObject.description: Add Event ID overworld in the map

RemoveObject.description: Removes Event ID overworld from the map

AddFreeCamera.description: Locks the camera at position X and Y

FacePlayer.description: Makes the invoking event to look at the player

GetPlayerMapPos.description: Saves the current player position in X and Y

GetOWPosition.description: Saves the current Event ID position in X and Y

KeepOverworld.description: If Value is 1, prevents Event ID from disappearing when entering a new map header

SetOWMovement.description: Changes the Event ID's movement number to Movement

SetFollowingOverworld.description: Assigns ID 0xFE for any overworld that follows the player

GiveMoney.description: Adds Money to the player's money

RemoveMoney.description: Subtracts Money from the player's money

CheckMoney.description: Returns 1 to Variable if the player has Money or more money, returns 0 otherwise

ShowMoney.description: Shows the money box at X and Y coordinates of the screen

UpdateMoneyDisplay.description: Updates the current money in the money box

ShowCoins.description: Shows the coin box at X and Y coordinates of the screen

UpdateCoinDisplay.description: Updates the current coins in the coin box

GetCoinsAmount.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of coins

AddCoins.description: Adds Coins to the player's coin case

SubstractCoinsFromValue.description: Subtracts Coins from the player's coin case

AddItem.description: Adds Amount of Item item, stores 1 in Variable if the player had less than 1000 - Amount (100 - Amount if TM/HM), stores 0 otherwise

RemoveItem.description: Subs Amount of Item item, stores 1 in Variable if the player had at least Amount items in the bag, stores 0 otherwise

CanFitItem.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the player has less than 1000 - Amount of Item items (100 - Amount if TM/HM), stores 0 otherwise

CheckItem.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the player has at least Amount of Item items in the bag, stores 0 otherwise

IsItemTMHM.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Item is TM or HM, stores 0 otherwise

GetItemPocket.description: Stores the bag pocket of Item in Variable

GiveGoods.description: Adds one Goods item to the underground PC, stores 1 in Variable if it could be stored and stores 0 otherwise

CheckGoodsSpace.description: Stores 1 in Variable if there's at least one free slot in the underground PC for a goods, stores 0 otherwise

GiveTrap.description: Adds one Trap item to the underground bag, stores 1 in Variable if it could be stored and stores 0 otherwise

GiveSphere.description: Adds one Sphere item of size Level to the underground bag, stores 1 in Variable if it could be given, stores 0 otherwise

CheckSealAmount.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of Seal ID seals

GiveSeal.description: Adds Amount of Seal ID seals if there's enough space for them

GetPartyMonForm.description: Stores in Variable the form of the Pokémon in Party Position

GivePokemon.description: Gives Pokémon at level Level with an Item, store 1 in Variable if succeed and 0 otherwise

GiveEgg.description: Gives a Pokémon egg received from Location text slot at text bank #435

ReplaceMove.description: Replaces Party Position Pokémon move at Move Position move slot by Move ID new move

CheckPartyMonHasMove.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Pokémon at Party Position knows Move ID move, stores 0 otherwise

FindPartySlotWithMove.description: Checks if any Pokémon in the party knows Move ID move, stores in Variable the position of the first Pokémon that knows it or stores 6 if no Pokémon in the party knows the move

DressPokemon.description: Shows Dress-Up screen with Pokémon at specified Party Pos

DisplayDressedPokemon.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the chosen Portrait Slot was correctly loaded, stores 1 otherwise

DisplayContestPokemon.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the chosen Contest Portrait Slot was correctly loaded, stores 1 otherwise

OpenPokemonStorage.description: Opens a PC screen to perform the chosen Operation.

EndGameScreen.description: Opens the Hall of Fame and game ending screens

StartChooseStarterScene.description: Opens the starter Pokémon selection screen

SaveChosenStarter.description: Stores the selected starter Pokémon in the save data and frees the Pokémon selection screen resources

ChoosePlayerName.description: Opens the keyboard for naming the player, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

ChoosePokemonNickname.description: Opens the keyboard for naming a Pokémon at Party Position, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

FadeScreen.description: Fade screen of Type type with Transition different screens of Time frames each one, to or from Color color

WaitFadeScreen.description: Wait for the screen fade to end

Warp.description: Warps to X and Y position of Map header with initial Dir direction, using Door warp

UseRockClimb.description: Uses rock climb with the Pokémon at Party Position position

UseSurf.description: Uses surf with the Pokémon at Party Position position

UseWaterfall.description: Uses waterfall with the Pokémon at Party Position position

FlyAnimation.description: Flies to Map header map, to coordinates X and Y

FlashAnimation.description: Sets weather to 0 (sunny) and then updates the weather graphics

DefogAnimation.description: Sets weather to 0 (sunny) and then updates the weather graphics

CutAnimation.description: Uses cut with the Pokémon at Party Position position

Tuxedo.description: Changes the current player form to the contest dress

CheckPlayerOnBike.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player is riding the bike, stores 0 otherwise

SetPlayerBike.description: Changes player form from normal to riding the bike if Action is 1, otherwise it sets the normal form to the player

CyclingRoad.description: If Action is 1, the game sets the cycling road flag and moves the player down. Otherwise the flag is deactivated.

GetPlayerState.description: Stores in Variable the current player form

SetPlayerState.description: Activates the Form bit in the internal player form data

ChangePlayerState.description: Updates changes in the internal player form data in the screen

BufferPlayerName.description: Stores player's name in String Buffer

BufferRivalName.description: Stores rival's name in String Buffer

BufferCounterpartName.description: Stores counterpart's name in String Buffer

BufferPartyMonSpecies.description: Stores the name of the Pokémon in Party Position in String Buffer

BufferItemName.description: Stores Item's name in String Buffer

BufferPocketName.description: Stores Pocket's name in String Buffer

BufferTMHMMoveName.description: Stores the name of the move contained in Item TM/HM in String Buffer

BufferMoveName.description: Stores battle Move's name in String Buffer

BufferNumber.description: Stores a Number in String Buffer

BufferPartyMonNickname.description: Stores the nickname of the Pokémon in Party Position in String Buffer

BufferPoketchAppName.description: Stores Pokétch App's name in String Buffer

BufferTrainerClassName.description: Stores Trainer's name in String Buffer

TextPlayerTrainerType.description: Stores player's Union Room trainer type in String Buffer

BufferSpeciesNameFromVar.description: Stores Pokémon's name in String Buffer

BufferPlayerStarterSpeciesName.description: Stores the name of the player' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

BufferRivalStarterSpeciesName.description: Stores the name of the rival' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

BufferPlayerCounterpartStarterSpeciesNam.description: Stores the name of the counterpart' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

GetPlayerStarterSpecies.description: Stores the starter Pokémon ID in Variable

BufferUndergroundGoodsName.description: Stores underground Goods' name in String Buffer

BufferUndergroundTrapName.description: Stores underground Trap's name in String Buffer

BufferUndergroundItemName.description: Stores underground Treasure's name in String Buffer

TextMapName.description: Stores Map header name in String Buffer

GetSwarmMapAndSpecies.description: Selects a zone depending on a random seed, then stores the zone ID in Map and the corresponding swarm Pokémon of that zone in Pokémon

GetTrainerID.description: Stores the trainer ID number in Variable depending on the script ID

StartTrainerBattle.description: Starts a battle against Trainer 1 and, if Trainer 2 is neither 0 nor the same as Trainer 1, a double battle against both

PrintTrainerDialogue.description: Displays the text of Trainer ID trainer at condition Type

GetTrainerMessageTypes.description: If the script ID corresponds to a single battle trainer, stores 0 in Noticing, 2 in Defeat and 0 in One Pokémon. If it corresponds to a double battle, stores 3, 5 and 6 or 7, 9 and 10 depending on whether it's the first or the second trainer

GetTrainerRematchMessageTypes.description: If the script ID corresponds to a single battle trainer, stores 17 in Noticing, 0 in Defeat and 0 in One Pokémon. If it corresponds to a double battle, stores 18, 0 and 6 or 19, 0 and 10 depending on whether it's the first or the second trainer

CheckIsTrainerDoubleBattle.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the script ID corresponds to a single battle, stores 1 if it corresponds to a double battle

PlayTrainerEncounterBGM.description: Retrieves the Trainer Class ID of the passed Trainer and plays its eye contact music.

BlackOutFromBattle.description: Return to Pokémon Center or player's house after being defeated

CheckWonBattle.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player has been defeated in battle, stores 1 otherwise

CheckLostBattle.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player defeated or caught the wild Pokemon, stores 1 otherwise

CheckHasTwoAliveMons.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has at least 2 not fainted Pokémon, stores 0 otherwise

StartDummyTrainerBattle.description: Starts a battle against trainer with ID 1

SetTargetTrainerDefeated.description: Sets the trainer flag with the same ID as the invoking event

GoToIfTargetTrainerDefeated.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if trainer flag with the invoking event ID is set

CheckPartyPokerus.description: Stores 1 in Variable if one or more Pokémon in the party are infected with the Pokérus

GetPokemonGender.description: Stores 0 in Variable if Pokémon at Party Position is male, 1 if is female and 2 if gender is unknown

SetWarpData.description: Changes the data of the special warp in the current map with Map destination header, X and Y coordinates and Dir player direction, saving Warp in the save data as the last used warp

GetFloorsAbove.description: Stores in Variable the current floor in a elevator

ElevatorBox.description: Shows the current floor number in a box at X and Y coordinates in the screen

CountSinnohDexSeen.description: Stores in Variable the total seen Pokemon in the Sinnoh Pokédex

CountSinnohDexObtained.description: Stores in Variable the total obtained Pokemon in the Sinnoh Pokédex

CountNationalDexSeen.description: Stores in Variable the total seen Pokemon in the National Pokédex

CountNationalDexObtained.description: Stores in Variable the total obtained Pokemon in the National Pokédex

GetDexProgressMsg.description: Checks the number of seen Pokémon in the Sinnoh Pokédex (if Mode is 0) or the number of obtained Pokémon in the National Pokédex (otherwise) and stores the corresponding Professor message in Variable

StartWildBattle.description: Starts a wild battle against a Pokémon of level Level

FirstBattle.description: Starts a first battle agains a Pokémon of level Level

SlatherHoneyTree.description: Updates the internal honey tree data for setting up a new wild encounter

GetHoneyTreeStatus.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player can spread honey in the tree, stores 2 if player already spread honey and stores 3 if the wild encounter is ready

StartHoneyTreeBattle.description: Starts the honey tree wild encounter

CheckSaveType.description: Stores 0 in Variable if a different savegame exists and it's not possible to save, stores 1 if no previous savegame exists, stores 2 if game has to save a lot of data and stores 3 if game can perform a quick save

SaveGame.description: Saves the game and stores 1 in Variable if savegame was succesfully made, stores 0 otherwise

CheckPortrait.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the chosen Portrait Slot is empty, stores 1 otherwise

CheckContestPortrait.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the chosen Contest Portrait Slot is empty, stores 1 otherwise

PoketchFlag.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the Poketch, stores 0 otherwise

RegisterPoketchApp.description: Adds App Poketch application to the player's Poketch

CheckPoketchAppRegistered.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has App Poketch application, stores 0 otherwise

PokeMartCommon.description: Opens the common mart shopping screen

PokeMartSpecialties.description: Opens the Mart ID mart shopping screen

PokeMartDecor.description: Opens the Mart ID goods mart shopping screen

PokeMartSeal.description: Opens the Mart ID seal mart shopping screen

BlackOutFromBattle2.description: Return to Pokémon Center or player's house after being defeated

SetLastWarp.description: Sets map's Warp ID warp as the last used warp

GetPlayerGender.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player is male, stores 1 if female

HealParty.description: Heals every Pokémon in the player's party

SetPlayerDirComm.description: Turns player towards the chosen Direction (used during communications with other players)

CheckPokedexAcquired.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the Pokédex, stores 0 otherwise

GivePokedex.description: Gives the Pokédex to the player

CheckRunningShoesAcquired.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the running shoes, stores 0 otherwise

GiveRunningShoes.description: Gives the running shoes to the player

CheckBadgeAcquired.description: Checks if player has Badge ID badge, stores boolean result in Variable

GiveBadge.description: Gives the player Badge ID badge

CountBadgesAcquired.description: Stores in Variable the number of badges obtained

CheckBagAcquired.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the bag, stores 0 otherwise

GiveBag.description: Gives the bag to the player

CheckHasPartner.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the following event flag is activated, stores 0 otherwise

SetHasPartner.description: Activates the following event flag, so you can no longer use the bike, surf, rock climb...

ClearHasPartner.description: Deactivates the following event flag, so you can use the bike, surf, rock climb... again

CheckStepFlag.description: Checks if player has moved one step, stores the result in Variable

CheckGameCompleted.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the game has been completed, stores 0 otherwise

DoorAnimation.description: Prepares a building located at Map X and Map Y coordinates in a map located at Matrix X and Matrix Y in the current matrix for animation, with Door ID animation ID

WaitDoor.description: Wait animation of building with Door ID animation ID

FreeDoor.description: Free animation of building with Door ID animation ID

OpenDoor.description: Triggers first animation of building with Door ID animation ID

CloseDoor.description: Triggers second animation of building with Door ID animation ID

BufferDaycareMonNicknames.description: Stores first daycare Pokémon nickname in string buffer 0, the second daycare Pokémon nickname in string buffer 1 and the first Pokémon trainer's name in buffer 2

GetDaycareState.description: If daycare Pokémon have an egg, stores 1 in Variable. Otherwise it stores 0 if no Pokémon is in the daycare, 2 if only one Pokémon is in the daycare or 3 if there are two Pokémon

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForPastoriaGym.description: Initializes Pastoria Gym internal data and 3D model animations

PastoriaGymButton.description: Checks if a button 3D model is at player position and moves the water level

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForHearthomeGym.description: Initializes Hearthome Gym internal data and 3D model animations

HearthomeGymLift.description: Triggers a elevator to move up or down

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForCanalaveGym.description: Initializes Canalave Gym internal data and 3D model animations

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForVeilstoneGym.description: Initializes Veilstone Gym internal data and 3D model animations

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForSunyshoreGym.description: Initializes Sunyshore Gym Room map internal data and 3D model animations

SunyshoreGymGear.description: Rotates Sunyshore Gym gears +90º if Rotation is 0, -90º if Rotation is 1 or +180º if Rotation is 2

GetPartyCount.description: Stores in Variable the current number of Pokémon in party

BagScreen.description: Opens the bag with only Normal pocket avalible if Mode is 0, otherwise only with the Berries pocket avalible

GetBagSelection.description: Stores in Variable the selected item after a BagScreen command, or zero if user cancels the selection

CheckPocketItems.description: Stores 1 in Variable if bag's Pocket has at least one item there, stores 0 otherwise

TextBerry.description: Stores the name of Item berry in String Buffer, returning a plural noun if Number is greater than 1

TextNature.description: Stores the name of Nature in String Buffer

GetBerryGrowth.description: Stores the current berry growth phase of the invoking event in Variable

GetBerrySpecies.description: Stores the berry item ID corresponding on the current invoking event berry tree in Variable

GetBerryMulch.description: Stores the mulch item ID corresponding on the current invoking event berry tree in Variable

GetBerryDryness.description: Stores the dryness grade corresponding on the current invoking event berry tree in Variable

CheckBerryAmount.description: Stores the amount of berries in the berry tree of the invoking event in Variable

SetBerryMulch.description: Sets Item mulch to the berry of the invoking event

SetBerrySpecies.description: Sets Item berry species to the berry of the invoking event

WateringAnimation.description: Sets the player the watering form if Action is 0, and the normal form if Action is 1

HarvestBerries.description: Picks up the berries of invoking event, and returns the tree to growth phase 0

SetObjectEventPos.description: Sets Event ID spawn position to global coords X and Y

SetOWPosition.description: Moves Event ID to global coords X, Y, Z with Dir direction

SetObjectEventMovementType.description: Sets Event ID's default move code to Movement ID

SetObjectEventDir.description: Sets Event ID's default direction to Direction ID

SetWarpEventPos.description: Moves Warp ID to global coords X and Y

SetSpawnablePosition.description: Moves Spawnable ID to global coords X and Y

SetOWDirection.description: Sets Event ID's current direction to Direction ID

WaitABPressTime.description: Stops script execution until Time frames have passed or until user presses A or B buttons

GetSelectedPartySlot.description: Stores in Variable the selected party slot in a party Pokémon screen, or 0xFF is user cancelled the selection

GetPartyMonSpecies.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the Pokémon at Party Position

CheckTradedPokemon.description: Stores 0 in Variable if trainer ID and secret ID of the Pokémon at Party Position are the player's ones, stores 1 otherwise

GetPartyCountHatched.description: Stores in Variable the number of Pokémon in the Pokémon party, excluding the eggs

CountAliveMonsExcept.description: Stores in Variable how many alive Pokémon would remain in the Pokémon party if Pokémon at Party Position disappeared

CountTotalAlivePokemon.description: Stores in Variable the number of Pokémon in the Pokémon party and PC boxes, excluding the eggs and fainted Pokémon

CountPartyEggs.description: Stores in Variable the number of eggs in the Pokémon party

RemoveMoney2.description: Subtracts Money from the player's money

CheckMoney2.description: Returns 1 to Variable if the player has Money or more money, returns 0 otherwise

EggHatchScreen.description: Opens the egg hatching screen with an egg in the Pokémon party that has 0 steps left for hatching

BufferDaycareGainedLevelsBySlot.description: Stores at string buffer 0 the nickname and at string buffer 1 the level of the Pokémon at Position daycare position, and also stores the level in Variable

UnvanishOverworld.description: Makes Event ID visible again if it was invisible

VanishOverworld.description: Makes Event ID invisible, but still collisionable

CountMail.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of mails in the mailbox

GetTimeOfDay.description: Stores in Variable the current time period of the day

GetRandom.description: Generates a random number between 0 and Range - 1, and stores it in Variable

GetRandom2.description: Generates a random number between 0 and Range - 1, and stores it in Variable

GetPartyMonFriendship.description: Stores in Variable the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

AddHappiness.description: Adds Happiness to the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

SubHappiness.description: Subs Happiness to the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

GetPlayerDir.description: Stores in Variable the direction the player is looking at

CheckPartyHasSpecies.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Pokémon is currently in the Pokémon party, stores 0 otherwise

CalcSizeContestResult.description: Stores 0 in Variable if Pokémon at Party Position has not a bigger relative size than player's record, stores 1 if it's the same size and stores 2 if it has a bigger relative size

UpdateSizeContestRecord.description: Stores the relative size of Pokémon at Party Position as player's record

BufferPartyPokemonSize.description: Stores the Integer part of Pokémon at Party Position size in Integer String Buffer (1 to 3 digits) and the decimal part of the size in Decimal String Buffer (1 digit)

BufferSizeContestRecord.description: Stores the Integer part of player's record size, normalized to Pokémon ID range, in Integer String Buffer (1 to 3 digits) and the decimal part of the size in Decimal String Buffer (1 digit)

InitSizeContestRecord.description: Initializes player's record size with a minimum required value

GetPartyMonMoveCount.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of moves that the Pokémon at Party Position has

DeleteMove.description: Deletes the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position

GetPartyMonMove.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position

TextPartyPokemonMove.description: Stores the name of the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position in String Buffer

Strength.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Disables Strength so player can no longer move boulders
1: Allows the player to automatically move Strength boulders
2: Checks if Strength is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Disables Strength so player can no longer move boulders
Allows the player to automatically move Strength boulders
Checks if Strength is activated, store answer in Variable

Flash.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Clears the Flash system flag
1: Sets the Flash system flag
2: Checks if Flash is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Clears the Flash system flag
Sets the Flash system flag
Checks if Flash is activated, store answer in Variable

Defog.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Clears the Defog system flag
1: Sets the Defog system flag
2: Checks if Defog is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Clears the Defog system flag
Sets the Defog system flag
Checks if Defog is activated, store answer in Variable

IncrementGameRecord.description: Increments the chosen Game Stat by 1.

CheckLocalDexCompleted.description: Stores 1 in Variable if every Pokémon in the Sinnoh Pokédex has been seen, stores 0 otherwise

CheckNationalDexCompleted.description: Stores 1 in Variable if every Pokémon in the National Pokédex has been caught, stores 0 otherwise

GetFossilCount.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of fossils in the bag

GetPokeNameFromFossil.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the Pokémon to which Item ID fossil belongs

CheckFossil.description: Stores in Item ID the ID of the first fossil in the bag that the player has at least Amount quantity of, and stores in Position the amount of fossils in the bag before the first fossil, that met the quantity condition

CountPokemonUnderLevel.description: Stores in Variable the amount of Pokémon in party whose level is equal or lower than Level

SurvivePoison.description: If Pokémon at Party Position is poisoned and at 1 HP, it cures the poison and stores 1 in Variable, otherwise it stores 0

MessageAllFromArchive.description: Display line Text Slot from Text Archive text file, all at once

MessageFromArchive.description: Display line Text Slot from Text Archive text file

GetPreviousMapID.description: Stores in Variable the header ID of the previous map accessed

GetCurrentMapID.description: Stores in Variable the current header ID

SetSafariFlag.description: If Flag is 0 safari encounters are activated, if Flag is 1 safari encounters are deactivated

BattleRoomWarp.description: Warps to X and Y position of Map header with initial Dir direction, using Door warp

ExitBattleRoom.description: Returns to previous map once wireless communication ends

StartGreatMarshLookout.description: Brings up the view of the Great Marsh and the daily Pokemon as seen from the viewing platform.

DrawPokemonPreview.description: Opens a window with the picture of Pokémon with Gender gender and registers the Pokémon in the Pokédex as seen

HidePokemonPic.description: Hides the window of a Pokémon picture

SpearPillarSequence.description: Starts a pre-scripted Spear Pillar sequence

InitPersistedMapFeaturesForGreatMarsh.description: Sets the safari train in the same sector where it was the last time it was moved

SafariTrainAnimation.description: Moves the safari train 3D model from its current position to Position safari sector, with the player not riding on it if Move Type is 3 or the player riding on the train otherwise

CheckSafariTrainMovement.description: Stores 5 in Variable if the safari train is currently at Position safari sector, stores 6 otherwise

SetPlayerHeightCalculationEnabled.description: If Flag Value is 0, the player becomes able to walk ignoring terrain heights, otherwise the flag is cleared and the mode is deactivated

GetPokemonNature.description: Stores in Variable the nature of the Pokémon at Party Position

CheckPartyNature.description: Stores in Variable the position of the first Pokémon with a given Nature ID in the player's party.

GetSpiritombCounter.description: Stores in Variable the current underground talk counter value

ClearAmitySquareStepCount.description: Sets the Amity Square step counter to zero

GetAmitySquareStepCount.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of steps walked in the Amity Square

CalcAmitySquareFoundAccessory.description: Stores in Variable a random accessory item ID corresponding to a specific Pokémon

ActivateRoamingPokemon.description: Activates a roaming Pokemon depending on the ID

UnionGroup.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Checks if group ID exists, returns answer in Variable
1: Checks if group ID is accesible, returns answer in Variable
2: Writes group ID name in String Buffer
3: Writes leader's name of Group ID in String Buffer
4: Opens keyboard, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels, 2 if group name already exists, 0 otherwise
5: Enter in group ID
6: Creates a group

variants.desc: Checks if group ID exists, returns answer in Variable
Checks if group ID is accesible, returns answer in Variable
Writes group ID name in String Buffer
Writes leader's name of Group ID in String Buffer
Opens keyboard, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels, 2 if group name already exists, 0 otherwise
Enter in group ID
Creates a group

RememberMoveScreen.description: Shows a list of moves that the Pokémon at the selected Party Position can remember.

ResponseRememberMove.description: Assigns 0 to Response Variable if the last Remember Move screen taught a move to one of the player's Pokémon. Assigns 0xFF if player cancelled the operation.

TeachMoveScreen.description: Shows a list with just the chosen Move ID, to be taught to Pokémon at given Party Position.

ResponseTeachMove.description: Assigns 0 to Response Variable if the last Teach Move screen taught a new move to one of the player's Pokémon. Assigns 0xFF if player cancelled the operation.

GetNpcTradeSpecies.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the offered Pokémon of the current trade data

GetNpcTradeRequestedSpecies.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the requested Pokémon of the current trade data

TradePokemonScreen.description: Opens the trade Pokémon screen, giving the Pokémon at Party Position and receiving the offered Pokémon of the current trade data

FinishNpcTrade.description: Frees the current trade data from the memory

ActivateInternationalDex.description: Allows the Pokédex to show international entries for some registered Pokémon

ActivateDimorphismDex.description: Allows the Pokédex to compare genders between Pokémon

GetSetNationalDexEnabled.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
1: Activates the National Pokédex mode
2: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the National Pokédex, otherwise it stores 0

CountPokemonRibbons.description: Stores in Variable the amount of ribbons that the Pokémon in Party Position has

CountPartyRibbons.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of different ribbons in the current Pokémon party

GetPartyMonRibbon.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the Pokémon in Party Position has the Ribbon ribbon, stores 0 otherwise

SetPartyMonRibbon.description: Gives the Ribbon ribbon to Pokémon in Party Position

TextRibbon.description: Stores the name of the Ribbon in String Buffer

CountPokemonEVs.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of effort values of Pokémon in Party Position

GetDayOfWeek.description: Stores in Variable the current day of the week

PCHealAnimation.description: Triggers the Pokémon Center healing animation with PokéBalls number of player's Pokémon

ElevatorAnimation.description: Triggers the animation of building #498 up (if Direction is 0) or down (if Direction is 1) Count consecutive times

MysteryGiftGive.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Initializes the data for receiving a Mystery Gift
1: Checks if there is a Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
2: Stores the Mystery Gift ID in Variable
3: Checks if player can receive the Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
4: Gives the Mystery Gift to the player
5: Shows the succeed text at Text File file and Text Line slot
6: Shows the unable text at Text File file and Text Line slot
7: Ends the Mystery Gift process
8: Saves data and ends the Mystery Gift process

variants.desc: Initializes the data for receiving a Mystery Gift
Checks if there is a Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
Stores the Mystery Gift ID in Variable
Checks if player can receive the Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
Gives the Mystery Gift to the player
Shows the succeed text at Text File file and Text Line slot
Shows the unable text at Text File file and Text Line slot
Ends the Mystery Gift process
Saves data and ends the Mystery Gift process

GetFirstNonEggInParty.description: Stores in Variable the slot of the first Pokémon in the party that is not an egg

GetPartyPokemonTypes.description: Gets the types of the Pokémon at a given Party Slot and stores them in Type1 and Type2 respectively.

GetJubilifeLotteryTrainerID.description: Stores Lotto random number in Variable

CheckForJubilifeLotteryWinner.description:
Takes a Winning Number as input and responds as follows.
If no matching Pokémon could be found or an error occurs: 
MatchPos: 0; Digits: 0; PC: 0.

For all other cases:

If the matching Pokémon is in the Player's party, PC will be assigned 0.
Otherwise, if it's in the Player's Storage System, PC will be assigned 1.

MatchPos stores the zero-based position of the winning Pokémon (either as Party pos or Storage System pos, depending on the value of PC).

When there's a match, the Digits var is assigned the number of matching digits of the Winning Pokémon's PID.
In case of multiple matches, priority is always given to the one with the most matching digits.

RandomizeJubilifeLottery.description: Generates two random numbers and assigns them to two system lottery Variables.

GetPCBoxesFreeSlotCount.description: Stores in Variable the amount of free Pokémon slots in PC boxes

InitLakeGuardianContainmentUnits.description:
Its behavior varies depending on the value of flag 2429.

0: Before rescuing the Lake Trio from Galactic Labs. It sets up the machines and animates them.
1: After rescuing the Lake Trio from Galactic Labs. The machines are off.

DeactivateLakeGuardianContainmentUnits.description: Waits for the Galactic Labs machines to complete their animations, then shuts them all down.

BufferAccessoryName.description: Stores Accessory's name in String Buffer

CheckPartyHasSpecies2.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Pokémon (or its egg) is currently in the Pokémon party, stores 0 otherwise

ChangeDeoxysForm.description: Sets every Deoxys in the Pokémon party the Form form

GetHour.description: Stores current hour from RTC in Variable

ShakeOverworld.description: Makes Event ID overworld to shake Count times in Time frames, moving X horizontally and Y vertically each shake

CheckHasAllLegendaryTitansInParty.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the 3 Regis in the party, stores 0 otherwise

MessageUnown.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file with the Unown font

GetGBACartridgeVersion.description: Stores the current GBA cartridge ID in Variable

ClearSpiritombCounter.description: Resets the underground talking counter to zero

SetHiddenLocation.description: Permanently changes a worldmap matrix cell corresponding to Alternative ID if Status is 1, reverts the change if 0

WriteStone.description: Opens the keyboard for writing in the Route 224 stone, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

TextStoneName.description: Stores the name that the player wrote in the Route 224 stone in String Buffer

GetPartyMonLevel.description: Stores into Result the level of the Pokémon at a given Party Slot.

SunyshoreBinoculars.description: Brings up the view of the Pokemon League Castle as seen from the Vista Lighthouse in Sunyshore City.

TextNumberSp.description: Stores a Number in String Buffer with Alignment Type alignment and Digits length

CheckBirthday.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the current day is the player's birthday, stores 0 otherwise

SetInitialVolumeForSequence.description: Identifies the BGM Player which is playing Music ID and sets its Volume

GetUnownFormsSeenCount.description: Stores in Variable the number of different seen Unown forms

CheckDistributionEvent.description:
Stores 1 into Variable in the following cases:
- Variable 16451 [0x4043] equals 4617
- Variable 16452 [0x4044] equals 4370
- Variable 16453 [0x4045] equals 4387
- Variable 16454 [0x4046] equals 4355

Stores 0 otherwise.

CountLeagueVictories.description: Retrieves the number of times the player has beaten the Pokémon League from the savedata file and stores the result in the Output Variable. If the data cannot be retrieved or is invalid, sets the return value to 0.

GetBP.description: Stores in Variable the number of Battle Frontier points the player has in their wallet.

AddBP.description: Adds the chosen Number of Battle Frontier points to Player's wallet.

SubBP.description: Removes the chosen Number of Battle Frontier points from Player's wallet.

CompareBP.description: Stores 1 into Variable if Player has at least the chosen Number of Battle Frontier points in their wallet, 0 otherwise.

ShakeCamera.description: Shakes the screen vertically (if Type is 0) or horizontally (if Type is 1)

StartTagBattle.description: Starts a double battle with Partner Trainer ID versus Trainer 1 ID and Trainer 2 ID

PartyPokemonTradeScreen.description: Opens the party Pokémon screen for a trade

UnlockMysteryGift.description: Shows Mystery Gift option in Start Menu.

GetOWMovement.description: Stores Overworld's Movement ID into passed Variable

IsSequencePlaying.description: Retrieves the Player of the given SSEQ and stores the number of SSEQs it is playing into Answer.

TextSeal.description: Stores the name of Seal ID seal in String Buffer

LockLastTalked.description: Locks every event in the map and waits the invoking overworld to finish its movement for locking it

CheckDidNotCapture.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the last Pokémon battle resulted in a successful capture, 1 otherwise.

StartLegendaryBattle.description: Starts a legendary battle against a Pokémon of predefined Level

CheckTrainerCardLevel.description: Stores in Variable the current trainer card level

ShowSaveBox.description: Displays the save data box (current map name, player's name, the amount of badges, the Pokédex counter and the play time)

ScopeMode.description: If Mode is 1, activates the scope mode, otherwise the command deactivates the scope mode

TextItemLowercase.description: Stores Item's lowercase name in String Buffer; International release exclusive.

TextItemPlural.description: Stores Item's plural noun in String Buffer; International release exclusive.

TextTrainerClass.description: Stores Trainer class' lowercase noun in String Buffer, International release exclusive.

TextSealPlural.description: Stores Seal's plural noun in String Buffer; International release exclusive.

TextCapitalize.description: Capitalizes the string currently stored in String Buffer; International release exclusive.

TextFloor.description: Stores Floor's name in String Buffer

WalkSlowerNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkNormalNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotNormalNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowWest.description: Event faces left and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowEast.description: Event faces right and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastWest.description: Event faces left and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastEast.description: Event faces right and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastWest.description: Event faces left and jumps westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastEast.description: Event faces right and jumps eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpFarNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps 2 tiles northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps 2 tiles southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarWest.description: Event faces left and jumps 2 tiles westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarEast.description: Event faces right and jumps 2 tiles eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

Delay1.description: Event waits for 1 frame; Equivalent to ~0.033 seconds (1/30s).

Delay2.description: Event waits for 2 frames; Equivalent to ~0.067 seconds (2/30s).

Delay4.description: Event waits for 4 frames; Equivalent to ~0.133 seconds (4/30s).

Delay8.description: Event waits for 8 frames; Equivalent to ~0.267 seconds (8/30s).

Delay15.description: Event waits for 15 frames; Equivalent to 0.5 seconds (15/30s).

Delay16.description: Event waits for 16 frames; Equivalent to ~0.533 seconds (16/30s).

Delay32.description: Event waits for 32 frames; Equivalent to ~1.067 seconds (32/30s).

WarpOut.description: Makes overworld ascend to the sky. No rotation involved.

WarpIn.description: Makes overworld fall from the sky. No rotation involved.

SetInvisible.description: Makes event invisible. It can still be interacted with and will still have collision.

LockDir.description: Prevents event from changing direction. It can still move, but it will always face the same direction.

UnlockDir.description: Allows event to change direction again.

PauseAnimation.description: Disables event's animation. It can still move, but it will not animate.

EmoteExclamationMark.description: Shows an exclamation mark above the event's head. Used commonly to indicate that the event is surprised or has noticed something.

WalkSlightlyFastNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastWest.description: Event faces right and walks westwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkFastestNorth.description: Event faces up and walks nothwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

JumpNearSlowWest.description: Event faces left and jumps westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpNearSlowEast.description: Event faces right and jumps eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpFartherWest.description: Event faces left and jumps 3 tiles westwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second. 12 frames in total.

JumpFartherEast.description: Event faces right and jumps 3 tiles eastwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second. 12 frames in total.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

NurseJoyBow.description: Nurse Joy bows. Used in the Pokémon Center.

RevealTrainer.description: Used by the ninja boys when popping out of the ground.

EmoteQuestionMark.description: Shows a double exclamation mark above the event's head.

EmoteExclamation2.description: Shows an exclamation mark above the event's head. Duplicate of EmoteExclamation (0x004B).

EndMovement.description: Action end marker. Used to indicate the end of a movement sequence.

1000.name: SEQ_DUMMY
1000.used_in: Dummy Track - Plays in Mystery Zone (Early version of Route 206)

1030.name: SEQ_TV_HOUSOU
1030.used_in: TV scene in the beginning of game

1088.name: SEQ_KENKYUJO
1088.used_in: Professor Rowan's Lab (before receiving the Pokedex)

1095.name: SEQ_FUE
1095.used_in: Azure Flute. Unused. Played when triggering Arceus event.

1096.name: SEQ_AUS
1096.used_in: Hall of Origin. Unused. Plays right after Azure Flute. Unsure if this or SEQ_THE_EVENT05 is used for the event.

1100.name: SEQ_EYE_BOY
1100.used_in: Encounter Youngster / School Kid / Bug Catcher / Camper

1104.name: SEQ_EYE_LADY
1104.used_in: Encounter Aroma Lady / Beauty / Female Swimmer

1115.name: SEQ_FIGHT0101
1115.used_in: Battle Trainer. Unused, exactly the same as SEQ_BA_TRAIN

1126.name: SEQ_BA_SECRET2
1126.used_in: Battle Rotom, Heatran, Regigigas, Giratina, Darkrai

1137.name: SEQ_BA_TOWER
1137.used_in: Battle Tower Tycoon. Unused. Uses Champion theme instead.

1140.name: SEQ_THE_EVENT01
1140.used_in: A surprise at the Lake! Played when two Starlys attack you right before your starter Pokemon

1145.name: SEQ_THE_EVENT03
1145.used_in: Dialga / Palkia ends the world cutscene

1146.name: SEQ_THE_EVENT05
1146.used_in: Hall of Origin. Unused. Plays right after Azure Flute. Unsure if this or SEQ_AUS is used for the event.

1154.name: SEQ_TV_END
1154.used_in: TV scene in the beginning of game ends
